Dear Dr. Tan,

We are pleased to offer you the position of Senior Research Scientist at XYZ Innovations Pte Ltd. Your start date will be 1st December 2023. You will be reporting directly to Mr. Alex Lim, Head of Research and Development.

Your annual salary will be SGD 120,000, payable monthly in accordance with our standard payroll practices. This offer is contingent upon the successful completion of reference checks and verification of credentials.

Please confirm your acceptance of this offer by signing and returning a copy of this letter by 15th November 2023.

Sincerely,  

Ms. Sarah Wong  
Human Resources Manager  
XYZ Innovations Pte Ltd
